ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription is Renewing Soon – Verify Details
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the full features of our SaaS platform. This email is a friendly reminder that your current subscription plan (Premium Pro) will automatically renew on 2026-04-30. Your account will be charged \$49.99 on the next billing cycle.

Please review the renewal details and update your payment information if necessary. If you wish to change your plan or cancel the subscription, log in to your account dashboard at <URL> and navigate to "Billing & Plans".

Thank you for being a valued customer. If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@saascompany.com.

Best regards,
SaaS Company Support Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: QuickBooks Invoice #98765 Overdue – Update Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued QuickBooks Customer,

Our records indicate that Invoice #98765, issued on 2026-03-01, remains unpaid with a balance of \$1,250.00. This invoice is related to your Norton Security subscription and must be settled within 48 hours to avoid service interruption.

QuickBooks Security Team urges you to resolve this matter immediately. To pay now, simply click the link below:

<URL>

Failure to pay by 2026-04-17 will result in automatic suspension of your QuickBooks and Norton services. If you believe this notice is in error, contact our billing department at billing@quickbooks.com immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this critical matter.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Security Operations
